'''Gacerian''' was the fourth [[Planet/Legends|planet]] in the [[Gacerian system/Legends|Gacerian system]]. It was home to many [[Gacerite (gemstone)|Gacerite]] mines and was the [[Homeworld/Legends|homeworld]] of the [[Gacerite]] [[Species/Legends|species]]. During [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] reign, the Imperial [[Governor/Legends|governor]] of the planet, [[Ulbrek Gostech]], was compassionate and kind, allowing the general populace to run the planet. Thus, the Gacerites were happy to abide by Imperial values and obey the laws dictated to them through their governor.
